tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo, but my midterm is tomorrow at 9am with only 40% of review left. I need to decide whether to go out or study more.
Mina declined the invitation to Echo, resolving my conflict between socializing and studying for the midterm.
Midterm progress improved to 0.78, but I missed the club window. Sleep debt remains high with no social plans pending.
Mina declined the Echo invitation, removing my social conflict. My midterm study progress improved to 0.92 with only sleep debt remaining.
Good sleep restored my energy to 10.0 and cleared sleep debt. With no pending social conflicts, I can focus fully on finishing midterm preparation.
Midterm study is complete. I am ready to begin the exam now.
